name: Harvest Apple Dressing
recipeInstructions:
- Heat oven to 425°F. Grease an 8x4-inch loaf pan.
- In a bowl, combine the enriched corn meal, all-purpose flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
- In another bowl, whisk together egg, milk, and melted margarine or butter.
- Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients; mix until just combined.
- Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
- Bake for about 30 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool on a wire rack.
Dressing:
- Heat oven to 350°F.
- In a large bowl, crumble the cooled corn bread.
- Add the bread cubes, cooked sausage, chopped apples, sage, and pepper; mix well.
- Cook onions in margarine until tender; add to the cornbread mixture.
- Stir bouillon granules into warm water; add to the cornbread mixture.
- Stir in egg. (For a moister dressing, stir in additional water.)
- Spoon into a 2-quart casserole dish. Cover and bake for 45 minutes or until heated through.
- Serve with chicken, turkey, ham, or pork.
Serving Size: Sixteen 1/2 cup servings
Nutritional Analysis per Serving:
- Calories: 149
- Carbohydrates: 13 g
- Protein: 4 g
- Fat: 9 g
- Calcium: 51 mg
- Sodium: 300 mg
- Cholesterol: 40 mg
- Dietary Fiber: 1 g
